text.font-family: 'Yu Mincho','Hiragino Mincho ProN','Zen Old Mincho','Songti SC',serif
'Yu Mincho','Hiragino Mincho ProN','Zen Old Mincho','Songti SC',serif
'Yu Gothic','Hiragino Kaku Gothic ProN','Zen Kaku Gothic New',system-ui,sans-serif
text.tspan: I’m Dearie — a developer who treats the
interface like a discipline, not a decoration.
I design and engineer systems that stay calm
as a baseline, and code the next person can
Like Nezuko — fangs sheathed until it matters,
